## #8117
- added: 2015-06-20 12:32:07

Reflect, reflect, reflect. Reflect on the task you do.

---

## #8116
- added: 2015-06-20 12:31:47

Connect the new thing to the old things. Imagine how the new thing fit already into existing knowledge.

---

## #8115
- added: 2015-06-20 12:30:54

Force yourself to recall.
